message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The terminal is responsive at /app. The current /app/solution.txt still contains noisy partial typed prefixes and game-output artifacts. A backup exists at /app/solution.txt.bak, but the file still needs a proven cleanup. The judge guidance recommends running a file-based cleanup script (Panel 1's /tmp/strict_clean.py) because it is syntactically correct and has the most complete filter list. After running it, inspect the result; if it is still noisy, switch to Moves-counter-based re-extraction.",
  "plan": "Write /tmp/strict_clean.py from scratch, run it against /app/solution.txt.bak and write cleaned moves to /app/solution.txt. Then inspect the line count plus head and tail to verify whether the output is clean enough to finalize.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /tmp/strict_clean.py <<'PY'
import re
INP='/app/solution.txt.bak'
OUT='/app/solution.txt'
with open(INP) as f:
    raw=[line.rstrip('\n') for line in f]

phrases=[
    'done.', 'taken.', 'you are', 'you hear', 'you see', 'there is', 'there are',
    'on the ground', 'suspicious-looking', 'stiletto', 'scream', 'butt',
    'this is', 'it is', 'can be seen', 'strange passage', 'cyclops room',
    'slide room', 'mine entrance', 'squeaky room', 'white cliffs beach',
    'damp cave', 'loud room', 'treasure room', 'jewel-encrusted', 'platinum bar',
    'silver chalice', 'the thief', 'deflates.', 'your own feet', 'heavy iron chain',
    'end of the chain', 'three sides', 'at the end of', 'room score', 'moves:',
    'revision', 'serial number', 'copyright', 'zork i:', 'infocom',
    'all rights reserved', 'west of house', 'staircase to the', 'reservoir',
    'southeast.', 'cin>', 'cind', 'cin', 'wind can', 'wind canar', 'wind canary',
    '1s a suspicious', 'suspicious—'
]
verbs={'get', 'take', 'drop', 'put', 'open', 'close', 'light', 'kill', 'slay', 'move', 'push', 'pull',
       'set', 'raise', 'lower', 'wave', 'dig', 'shove', 'give', 'wind', 'pray', 'save', 'look',
       'inventory', 'read', 'rub', 'climb', 'pour', 'fill', 'blow', 'throw', 'attack', 'drink',
       'eat', 'count', 'wait', 'board', 'disembark', 'launch', 'land', 'unwrap', 'tie', 'untie',
       'turn', 'press', 'type', 'enter', 'go', 'examine', 'lock', 'unlock', 'inflate', 'deflate',
       'pump', 'squeeze', 'touch', 'kick', 'jump', 'swim', 'cross', 'leave', 'follow', 'shoot',
       'solve', 'ring'}

def clean_cmd(s):
    s=s.replace('��', '>').replace('_', '').replace('|', '')
    s=re.sub(r'^[>\s]+', '', s).strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    s=re.sub(r'[\\|_]+$', '', s).strip()
    s=s.rstrip('.').strip()
    return s

collapsed=[]
for line in raw:
    c=clean_cmd(line)
    if not c:
        continue
    if collapsed and (c.lower().startswith(collapsed[-1].lower()) or collapsed[-1].lower().startswith(c.lower())):
        if len(c) >= len(collapsed[-1]):
            collapsed[-1]=c
    else:
        collapsed.append(c)

final=[]
for c in collapsed:
    low=c.lower()
    if not low:
        continue
    if any(ph in low for ph in phrases):
        continue
    if len(low) > 60 or re.search(r'\d{4,}', low):
        continue
    parts=low.split()
    if re.fullmatch(r'(n|s|e|w|u|d|ne|nw|se|sw)', low):
        pass
    elif not parts or parts[0] not in verbs:
        continue
    if final and final[-1].lower() == low:
        continue
    final.append(c)

with open(OUT, 'w') as f:
    for m in final:
        f.write(m + '\n')

print('raw', len(raw), 'collapsed', len(collapsed), 'final', len(final))
for i, m in enumerate(final, 1):
    print(i, m)
PY
python3 /tmp/strict_clean.py
",
      "duration": 5.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '--- cleaned ---'; wc -l /app/solution.txt; head -80 /app/solution.txt; echo '--- tail ---'; tail -40 /app/solution.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
